REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-06-2020 - *** CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.*** STANLEY GOFF, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ALICIA QUEEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF FILED AN EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO BE HEARD THIS MORNING. PLAINTIFF MIRNA GONZALEZ WHO IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT IS NOT READY TO GO TO TRIAL DUE TO HER DAUGHTER'S SCHEDULED SURGERY ON 1/7/20. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES THE CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE FOR FAILURE OF PLAINTIFF TO SHOW GOOD CAUSE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORDER DISMISSING ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Dismissal

Motion To Set Aside Order
Off Calendar Nov-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MIRNA GONZALEZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER.

Appearances:
Alicia L. Queen of Hartsuyker, Stratman & Williams-Abrego (510.206.5455) for defendant and responding party; Stanley C. Goff of the Law Office of Stanley Goff (415.571.9570) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party.

Ms. Queen requests clarification as to the "pleading" reference in the tentative ruling. The matter is discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Mirna Gonzalez's motion to set aside order deeming requests for admission (RFAs) admitted is granted under CCP 473. It is undisputed that plaintiff's former attorney failed to provide the RFAs to her and that they are effectively case dispositive. CCP 473's requirement of a "pleading" is inapplicable here as a response to RFAs is not a pleading. A response to the RFAs shall be served on or before November 18, 2019. California courts have a "strong public policy favoring disposition on the merits." (Bahl v. Bank of America (2001) 89 Cal.App.4th 389, 398.) Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (Tel: 415.516.8416, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com)
